theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of R𝜆:𝑇2→𝑇2 I(R𝜆Φ) is an algebraic definition, written R𝜆:𝑇2→𝑇2 I(R𝜆Φ)=I(Φ). It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from I, defining R𝜆:𝑇2→𝑇2 I(R𝜆Φ). Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
